description:
Start with a pile of rocks and turn it into something people actually drive on.

Collect raw materials, move them to processing, and turn them into fresh asphalt ready to be laid down. Then get to work, spread it, smooth it, and watch rough ground turn into clean, solid roads.

Every completed stretch earns you money, and every upgrade makes the job faster. Better tools, stronger vehicles, and heavy machines take the pressure off and keep things moving while you focus on expanding.

Build more, automate more, and keep the operation running efficiently as the workload grows. What starts as manual work slowly becomes a full construction setup running around you.

It’s simple: gather, process, pave, repeat, until there’s a road where there used to be nothing. Just don’t step in the asphalt before it cools.
